packageRules.description: Builder stage in Dockerfile.ci is pinned to JDK 25 to match the Gradle toolchain (build.gradle.kts languageVersion=25); bumping it to 26 breaks `gradle build` (no JDK 25 toolchain, download not configured). Only the JRE runtime tracks newer majors. Remove this rule when the Gradle toolchain moves off 25.

testcontainers 2.x ships core-only: the modular artifacts (org.testcontainers:mysql/postgresql/mongodb/junit-jupiter) were dropped and have no 2.x release (Maven Central maven-metadata latest = 1.21.4), while org.testcontainers:testcontainers jumped to 2.0.x. gradle/libs.versions.toml pins all five modules to one `testcontainers` version ref, so any v2 bump fails `:extractIncludeTestProto` with `Could not find org.testcontainers:mysql:2.x` (see closed PR-65 and branch renovate/major-testcontainers-java-monorepo build #2). Block the major until the modular artifacts publish a 2.x; remove this rule then.
